message:
feat(mission): deterministic planner solver with capacity, conflicts, and safety gates (ft-1i2ge.2.5)

Adds solve_assignments() greedy solver that assigns scored candidates to
agents respecting capacity limits, conflict pairs, safety gate denials,
and score thresholds. Produces AssignmentSet with full rejection reasons.
19 new solver tests (78 total in module).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
